description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Client (JS) that triggers on push to specific paths and on pull requests. Run a build-and-publish job on ubuntu-latest that checks out the code, sets up Node.js 12.16.1, and performs npm ci, build, and test steps for WebAssets, AspNetCore.Demo, and Owin.Demo. If the push is to the master branch, publish the WebAssets package to npm using the NPM_TOKEN from secrets and upload the package artifact.
